notes: Full menu captured from the online ordering page (starters, entrees, curried entrees, meat sides, sides, dessert, drinks). Prices carry odd cents because they come from the online-ordering platform. Vegan/GF marks preserved where the menu states them. 'Meat sides' are a-la-carte proteins -> course_type side. Drinks are non-alcoholic (this is a casual Caribbean kitchen, not a bar).
